items.title: ml-intern
items.description: 🤗 ml-intern: an open-source ML engineer that reads papers, trains models, and ships ML models
items.description_zh: 🤗 ml-intern：开源 ML 工程师，负责阅读论文、训练模型和发布 ML 模型

items.title: claude-context
items.description: Code search MCP for Claude Code. Make entire codebase the context for any coding agent.
items.description_zh: 代码搜索 MCP 以获得克劳德代码。使整个代码库成为任何编码代理的上下文。

items.title: hackingtool
items.description: ALL IN ONE Hacking Tool For Hackers
items.description_zh: 黑客的多合一黑客工具

items.title: RuView
items.description: π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.
items.description_zh: π RuView：WiFi DensePose 将商用 WiFi 信号转化为实时人体姿势估计、生命体征监测和存在检测 - 所有这些都无需视频像素。

items.title: Open-Generative-AI
items.description: Uncensored, open-source alternative to Higgsfield AI, Freepik, Krea, Openart AI — Free, unrestricted AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.
items.description_zh: Higgsfield AI、Freepik、Krea、Openart AI 的未经审查、开源替代方案 — 免费、不受限制的 AI 图像和视频生成工作室，拥有 200 多个模型（Flux、Midjourney、Kling、Sora、Veo）。没有内容过滤器。自托管，麻省理工学院许可。

items.title: free-claude-code
items.description: Use claude-code for free in the terminal, VSCode extension or via discord like openclaw
items.description_zh: 在终端、VSCode 扩展中或通过 openclaw 等 Discord 免费使用 claude-code

items.title: OpenMetadata
items.description: OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.
items.description_zh: OpenMetadata 是一个统一的元数据平台，用于数据发现、数据可观察性和数据治理，由中央元数据存储库、深入的列级沿袭和无缝团队协作提供支持。

items.title: ai-agents-for-beginners
items.description: 12 Lessons to Get Started Building AI Agents
items.description_zh: 开始构建 AI 代理的 12 课

items.title: PowerShell
items.description_zh: 适用于每个系统的 PowerShell！

items.title: cline
items.description: Autonomous coding agent right in your IDE, capable of creating/editing files, executing commands, using the browser, and more with your permission every step of the way.
items.description_zh: IDE 中的自主编码代理，能够在每一步都经过您的许可的情况下创建/编辑文件、执行命令、使用浏览器等。

items.title: onnxruntime
items.description: ONNX Runtime: cross-platform, high performance ML inferencing and training accelerator
items.description_zh: ONNX Runtime：跨平台、高性能机器学习推理和训练加速器

items.title: context-mode
items.description: Context window optimization for AI coding agents. Sandboxes tool output, 98% reduction. 12 platforms
items.description_zh: AI 编码代理的上下文窗口优化。沙盒工具输出，减少 98%。 12个平台

items.title: marketingskills
items.description: Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.
items.description_zh: Claude Code 和 AI 代理的营销技巧。 CRO、文案、SEO、分析和增长工程。

items.title: aie-book
items.description: [WIP] Resources for AI engineers. Also contains supporting materials for the book AI Engineering (Chip Huyen, 2025)
items.description_zh: [WIP] 面向 AI 工程师的资源。还包含《AI Engineering》一书的支持材料（Chip Huyen，2025 年）
